name: Super Turkey Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey, onion, and half the cheese in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix together the soups and enchilada sauce.
3. Heat the tortillas for a few seconds on each side until softened (microwave can be used).
4. Place a heaping tablespoon of the turkey mixture onto each tortilla.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly with the filling on the side.
6. Arrange the rolled tortillas seam-side down in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Pour the remaining sauce over the enchiladas, then top with the remaining cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Makes six servings. Leftovers can be refrigerated and reheated.
